name: Roasted Red Pepper and Chive Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the sweet red pepper over a flame and turn it until evenly charred. Alternatively, cut the pepper in half, rub with oil, and broil under the broiler until blackened.
2. Wrap the pepper in plastic wrap and let it cool.
3. Scrape off the burned skin and remove seeds and stem from the pepper.
4. In a blender or food processor fitted with a steel blade, combine the roasted pepper, vinegar, and garlic. Process until smooth.
5. Slowly drizzle in the olive oil while the machine is running to fully combine all ingredients.
6. Stir in the chopped chives and season with salt and white pepper to taste.
This recipe features at Neiman-Marcus and was provided by caterer George Dolese. It is typically served over a salad of fusilli pasta, fresh mozzarella chunks, julienned zucchini, prosciutto slices, smoked chicken pieces, and blanched asparagus.
